scenes.text:
They did not teach you about money
in school. That was on purpose.

The system is designed to produce good employees, not financially free people. They teach you algebra but not how to file taxes. They teach you history but not how to
build credit. They teach you to work for money but not how to make money work for you. Financial illiteracy is the most expensive problem you will ever have.

Take your financial education into your own hands. Read one book about money every month. Learn about
taxes, investing, credit, and cash flow. The knowledge is free. The cost of ignorance is everything.

Financial literacy is not optional. It is
the difference between freedom and chains.

What money book changed your life? Drop
it below. Follow for financial education.
